channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Son of radicals, Zayd Ayers Dohrn recounts a childhood underground and on the run
item.description: Dohrn's parents, Bill Ayers and Bernardine Dohrn, co-founded the Weather Underground. He recalls knowing the FBI was chasing them in his memoir.

item.title: Trump drops IRS lawsuit, clearing path for a settlement
item.description: The president sued the IRS and Treasury in January, demanding $10 billion over the leak of his tax returns years ago.

item.title: Jury rejects all claims in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
item.description: Musk had sought to remove Altman from his leadership role, alleging he and others violated OpenAI's original nonprofit mission.

item.title: Supreme Court declines to take up Voting Rights Act enforcement dispute for now
item.description: The Supreme Court has temporarily avoided addressing a legal question that could further limit enforcement of the Voting Rights Act.
